title: UR-SKILL Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for UR-SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Conforms to agentskills.io open standard with minimal UR-SKILL convention: metadata.updated. See agentskills.io/specification for the base standard.

name.description: [agentskills.io 必填] Unique SKILL identifier in kebab-case. Must match parent directory name.

description.description: [agentskills.io 必填] The ONLY field all platforms use for trigger matching. Covers both capability description and trigger scenarios.

updated.description: [UR-SKILL 必填] Last updated date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Serves two purposes: (1) version change tracking, (2) helps LLM judge data freshness and whether domain knowledge might be outdated.

metadata.description: [agentskills.io 可选] Arbitrary key-value mapping. UR-SKILL only requires 'updated' key.

examples.name: python-code-review
examples.description: Use when the user wants to review Python code for quality, security, style, or performance. Invoke for code inspection, bug hunting, refactoring suggestions.

examples.name: ur-skill-cn
examples.description: Use whenever the user wants to create, design, standardize, or package a SKILL.md file, AI agent skill, or structured system prompt. Invoke even if they don't explicitly say 'SKILL'. Chinese version.
